items.title: teLLMe Why (Ain't Nothing but a Jam): Exploratory Causal Analysis of Urban Driving Data
items.abstract: Traffic agencies now have access to large volumes of video-derived data for studying safety and congestion. Most of these data are observational and collected without interventions, which makes causal questions such as "How would rain change traffic density?" difficult to answer. We present teLLMe, a system for exploratory causal analysis of urban driving datasets. The system starts from a structured event table built from dashcam annotations and combines causal structure learning with the PC algorithm, bootstrap-based stability checks, and query-specific effect estimation using linear regression and DoWhy. Natural-language questions are mapped to structured causal queries through a schema-aware LLM, enabling users to specify treatments, outcomes, and subpopulations. teLLMe returns a "Causal Card" that summarizes effect estimates, adjustment sets, DAG support, and assumptions, followed by a short natural-language explanation. Case studies on BDD-derived traffic events show that the system can surface plausible relationships involving weather, peak hours, and traffic density, while making uncertainty and modeling choices explicit. The system is designed as a tool for hypothesis generation and expert reasoning rather than a source of definitive causal claims.
items.llm_evidence_en: exploratory causal analysis with PC algorithm and DoWhy
items.llm_evidence_cn: 使用PC算法和DoWhy进行探索性因果分析
items.llm_evidence: 使用PC算法和DoWhy进行探索性因果分析
items.canonical_evidence: 使用PC算法和DoWhy进行探索性因果分析
items.llm_tldr_en: Presents teLLMe, a system for exploratory causal analysis of urban driving data using PC algorithm, bootstrap stability, and DoWhy effect estimation.
items.llm_tldr_cn: 针对城市驾驶数据难以回答因果问题的困境，本文提出teLLMe系统，整合PC算法进行因果结构学习、bootstrap稳定性检验和DoWhy效应估计，并通过LLM将自然语言转化为查询。系统在实际驾驶数据集上展示了有效的因果发现和效应估计能力，为观测性数据因果分析提供了易用交互平台。
items.llm_tldr: 针对城市驾驶数据难以回答因果问题的困境，本文提出teLLMe系统，整合PC算法进行因果结构学习、bootstrap稳定性检验和DoWhy效应估计，并通过LLM将自然语言转化为查询。系统在实际驾驶数据集上展示了有效的因果发现和效应估计能力，为观测性数据因果分析提供了易用交互平台。
